key_risks: Tech rebound could cause cap-weight leaders (QQQ/SMH) to outperform the chosen breadth tilt and SPY benchmark.
Biotech's sharp recent rally could mean-revert sharply within the week.
Hot PCE on June 25 could lift rates and pressure small caps and regional banks.
Risk-off escalation from Korea/semiconductor weakness could spill into high-beta small caps and biotech.

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum (+8.7% 7d) with M&A and clinical catalysts; relatively insulated from mega-cap tech weakness dragging the index.
Positive breadth, +1.1% 7d while index fell; better domestic insulation from semiconductor/tech rout, strong YTD momentum.
Strong relative strength (+1.5% 7d, +6% 30d), benefits from breadth rotation and steeper curve dynamics.
Stable carry buffer amid tech-led volatility and CPI re-acceleration risk.
Momentum factor holding up (+1.1% 7d, +8.7% 30d) and diversifies away from concentrated mega-cap drawdown.

portfolio_rationale: Tech/semiconductor mega-caps are dragging the cap-weighted index while breadth is positive; tilt toward small caps, biotech, regional banks, and momentum that have shown relative strength, with short Treasury as ballast.
rationale_summary: Lean into the breadth-positive, non-mega-cap segments showing recent relative strength while holding a cash-like buffer against renewed tech volatility and sticky inflation.
